## How I tested

- [ ] `python setup.py --fast` runs clean
- [ ] `python main.py` serves the app and `/health` returns ok
- [ ] Updated metrics / plots where relevant

## Review checklist

- [ ] Code is modularised into functions/classes (no loose top-level execution)
- [ ] External/AI-assisted code is attributed at the top of the file
- [ ] Docstrings and descriptive names
- [ ] No large data or model binaries committed unintentionally
